violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet wiping cloth was found stored on the counter near hot holding unit. Wiping cloths should be stored in a sanitizing solution between uses or laundered.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Multiple food items were found not date marked in the walk-in cooler and refrigerated prep table. Potentially hazardous food items should be date marked so proper disposition can occur.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Wire shelving units in the walk-in cooler were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood ventilation system was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Towel dispensers were found empty at the hand washing stations near the dish machine and the cook line. Paper towels should be available at all times. ** Corrected during inspection.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Wire shelving units in the walk-in cooler and the burners on the range were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Ventilation hood system was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling in the kitchen was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
